title: dichotomeo #1371
definition:
1) to cut into two parts
    1a) of the cruel method of punishment used by the Hebrews and
        others of cutting one in two
 2) cut up by scourging, scourge severely
nasbUsage:

    1a) of the cruel method of punishment used by the Hebrews and
        others of cutting one in two
 2) cut up by scourging, scourge severely
